name: Puffed Apple Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup milk (do not use lowfat or non-fat)
1/4 cup firmly packed dark brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Place 4 custard cups on a baking sheet. Pour 1 tablespoon butter into each custard cup.
3. Combine eggs, milk, and flour in a bowl and stir until just blended.
4. Divide the batter among the custard cups.
5. Toss apple slices with sugar and lemon juice until coated.
6. Arrange apple slices in spoke pattern over the batter.
7. Bake until pancakes are puffed and golden, about 15 minutes.
8. Serve with maple syrup.
